experiment_ref: DE-0006 実装 + SoR 契約試験 test_sor.py + H6 counter-factual (2026-07-05)
observation: counters.json(events から導出不能な第2 SoR)を廃止。id は append_event 内で log high-water から採番=『採番済み id ⟺ その id を刻む event が log に存在』。high-water は log 再スキャンで復元(第2 SoR 不要)。H6=採番+書込を fcntl.flock の同一 critical section に。test_sor 9/9 PASS。H6 の load-bearing 性を counter-factual で実証: lock を no-op に差し替えると 4プロセス×30=120 採番が 51 uniq(69 衝突/lost write)に崩れる、lock 有効で 120/120。lock は飾りでなく必要。実装中に id-in-append が candidate↔relation の相互参照 cycle を顕在化させたが、relation.to_id は gate1/build_packet から未読(candidate 起点で evidence_relations→from_id のみ辿る)=vestigial と判明 → relation を to_id=None で candidate 前に先行生成して cycle を断った(model 上正当、未読フィールドのため無害)
decision: ADOPT
amendment_ref: core.new_id/counters.json 廃止。append_event(new_prefix=) が id 採番+SELF番兵置換+書込を lock 内で実施し object_id を返す。run_start は id==run_id を SELF で。constructors/apply_outcome/curator/run/run2/test を id-in-append へ移行。RC-3/RC-4 無退行、enforce 13/13 無退行
decision_owner: Claude Code (engineering, DE-0006 実装) + Taka (前ターン value 裁定)
note: provenance: ENGINEERING_FORCED / test-verified。H6 は counter-factual で load-bearing 確認済。ただし独立敵対レビューは未実施→JUDGE_VERIFIED は騙らない。⚠️ **DE-0006 の content-hash 観測(『observationはcontent_hash据置』)は本実装に未含**: 観測を content-addressed 化すると identity/dedup(CS-1)意味論が変わるため分離。原文『据置』の解釈も曖昧 → AB-0006 に切出し Taka 確認待ち。現状は全 object 一律 log-monotonic 連番

observation: DE-0006『据置』の意図は『observation を content-addressed 化せよ』ではなく、『observation は既に content_hash を field として持つので ID 可読性の議論が実質効くのは claim/gap 系だ』= log 由来連番を支持する論拠の一部だった。全 object 一律 log-monotonic 連番は意図を完全に満たす。content_hash は今後も ID でなく field として生きる=役割は完全性検証(Gate1)と重複観測検出であって同一性の定義ではない。idempotent create(同一内容の再取得を同一 observation に畳む)は operational need が示してから起票(MOR-1)
decision: CONFIRM_NO_CHANGE
amendment_ref: AB-0006 RESOLVED。実装(一律連番)据置。content_hash は field のまま
note: provenance: JUDGE_VERIFIED(value=content_hash は field であって identity でない)。1問で解ける曖昧さを補完せず確認に回した手続きを Taka が是認

affected_rules: DE-0014 信用の根移動(M4該当項)
observation: partial-update event を append_event が構造 reject。UPDATE の payload は現 object の全キー(top-level + 1段 nested)を包含する完全 revision でなければならない。『完全 object を書く契約』を driver 正直性(M1 故障型)に委ねず validator=append_event の write guard に移した。信用の根の移動(DE-0014 観点): schema 完全性の根が driver→append_event(書込権限を持つ唯一の関数=CU-1 と同じ場所)へ。run_end/mk_search_leg/gap reopen/plan note を RMW(get_state→update→完全書込)に変換。test_sor T6=partial(兄弟キー drop)を reject・完全 revision は通る(counter-factual)、T7=nested 兄弟キー(temporal.y)drop も reject・完全なら保存。RC-3/RC-4・enforce 13/13 無退行
decision: ADOPT
amendment_ref: _check_complete_revision を append_event の lock 内(SELF 置換後・書込前)で実行。core.get_state 追加(RMW の read 面)。build_view は merge 維持(完全 event 同士の merge は無損失のため deep-merge 不要=DE-0007 が退けた list/削除の曖昧さを回避)
decision_owner: Claude Code (engineering, DE-0007 実装) + Taka (前ターン value 裁定)
note: provenance: ENGINEERING_FORCED/test-verified。独立レビュー未=JUDGE_VERIFIED は騙らない。scope: 2段以上の深い nested は 1段 guard では検出せず RMW 規律で担保(deep validation は operational need 待ち MOR-1)。M4 契約の最初の適用例= AB-0007 relation 完結 event(次段)

affected_rules: DE-0014 信用の根移動(L4該当項)
experiment_ref: DE-0008 実装(derive + CORRECTION)+ test_sor T8/T9 (2026-07-05)
observation: L4 2部。(A 導出) validation_mode 既定 DECLARED を廃止。gates.derive_validation_mode が provenance からコード導出: ABSENCE→SPECIFIED(SC-2 で coverage 完全性を leg event から再導出済=spec 準拠が provenance-backed)/ POSITIVE→grounds を辿り PRIMARY 到達で DECLARED / 導出不能で UNRESOLVED。候補の自己申告 validation_mode は不使用(『公式主体が宣言したと一次確認した』の無根拠メタデータ捏造を殺す=無根拠 claim の第一原則をメタデータ層へ適用)。信用の根の移動(DE-0014 観点): validation_mode の根が『候補の自己申告=既定値』→『provenance 導出コード』へ。canonical: C-00001=DECLARED(PRIMARY 由来), C-00002=SPECIFIED(ABSENCE)。(B 訂正機構=Taka forward requirement) 過去 event を書換えず訂正する CORRECTION event を実装

correction_event_form.note: CREATE/UPDATE/DECISION と並ぶ新 event_type。build_view は通常 event と同じく merge(訂正値が最新として勝つ)。原 CREATE event は log にそのまま残存=append-only 不変。RC-3 維持。M4 guard は CORRECTION にも完全 revision を要求(UPDATE 同扱い)
correction_event_form.payload: M4 完全 revision(現状 + changes)+ corrections 履歴(list, append)

decision: ADOPT
amendment_ref: validation_mode 既定廃止→derive-or-UNRESOLVED(gates.derive_validation_mode)。core.correct_object + event_type CORRECTION。M4 guard を CORRECTION に拡張
decision_owner: Claude Code (engineering, DE-0008 実装) + Taka (前ターン value 裁定 + correction 形式 forward req)
note: provenance: ENGINEERING_FORCED/test-verified(T8 導出3値=UNRESOLVED は counter-factual / T9 訂正値有効・from-to provenance・原 event 不変=append-only・nested 兄弟保存)。独立レビュー未=JUDGE_VERIFIED は騙らない。**この CORRECTION 形式が Phase 1b claim retraction / status 撤回の先例**(status→RETRACTED, valid_until 打切り等が同一機構で表現可)。AB-0007 relation 完結 event(to_id を後続 event で埋める)も同機構=『後続 event による object の完結・訂正』同型2例が揃った。canonical demo stream は run.py が再生成し derive 済で書かれるため stale DECLARED は残らないが、機構は持続 stream / Phase 1b 本番用

observation: relation.to_id を candidate 確定後に COMPLETION event で結線し、恒久 null link(OM-3 の穴=Taka 指摘)を残さない。core.complete_object(event_type 'COMPLETION'、payload=M4 完全 revision + completions 履歴{completed_at,completed_by_run,reason,field_fills:{f:{from,to}}})。pipeline.mk_candidate が『candidate 作成→各 evidence_relation の to_id 結線』を一手にまとめ、drivers が結線を忘れられない構造にした(seam-6 write surface 統一の芽)。CORRECTION と同型(append-only・完全 revision・原 event 不変)だが意味は訂正でなく placeholder 結線=完結。canonical REL-00001/00002 の to_id 結線済(run.py/run2/test を mk_candidate 経由に統一)
decision: ADOPT
amendment_ref: core.complete_object + event_type COMPLETION(M4 guard 対象)。pipeline.mk_candidate。run/run2/test_enforce を mk_candidate 経由に統一
decision_owner: Claude Code (engineering, AB-0007) + Taka (OM-3 caveat + 順序裁定)
note: provenance: ENGINEERING_FORCED/test-verified(T10: to_id 結線・原 CREATE は to_id=None のまま log 残存=append-only・from None→to cid の completions provenance)。独立レビュー未。DE-0016 correction と合わせ『後続 event による object の完結(COMPLETION)・訂正(CORRECTION)』同型2例が揃った=Phase 1b retraction の先例セット完成(Taka 予告どおり)

affected_rules: polarity 層 vs mode 層
counterexample_ref: JREV-0001 R5(GPT 監査, Taka confirmed + 設計責任一部自認)
observation: ABSENCE→SPECIFIED は semantic defect。v0.2 の validation_mode 体系は positive claim 用に定義され ABSENCE の mode を未定義で放置、実装が空白を最悪値(SPECIFIED)で埋め『公式仕様に規定された不在』と『調査完遂したが見つからない不在』を再混同していた=この系が第一日に殺すと誓った混同。修正: ABSENCE は通常 validation_mode を持たず absence_validation{mode:SEARCH_COVERAGE_COMPLETED, search_plan_id} を持つ(gates.derive_absence_validation)。SPECIFIED は polarity=NEGATIVE(明示的不支持, PRIMARY 必須)専用に保存。taxonomy は polarity 層で既にこの区別を持つので mode 層で再融合させない。derive_validation_mode は ABSENCE で ValueError
decision: AMEND
amendment_ref: gates.derive_validation_mode を POSITIVE(PRIMARY→DECLARED)/NEGATIVE(PRIMARY→SPECIFIED)専用化・ABSENCE は reject。gates.derive_absence_validation 新設。apply_outcome ABSENCE 分岐は absence_validation を持つ
decision_owner: Taka(裁定, 設計責任一部自認) + GPT(検出) + Claude Code(実装)
note: provenance: JUDGE_VERIFIED(value=別軸分離が正しい, Taka)/ 実装 test-verified(test_sor T8c-e)。canonical C-00002 は absence_validation を持ち validation_mode を持たない

affected_rules: property atomicity(AC-1 のレビューへの適用)
counterexample_ref: JREV-0002(GPT 暫定, Taka relay): self-grant attack
observation: R1 の audit は『grant exists?』だけで『who may issue grant?』を見ず、RD が自分に CORRECTOR を GRANT すれば(self-grant)audit clean になる穴があった。修正: GRANT に issuer を刻み、CAPABILITY_ISSUERS(authorized issuer=root)発行時のみ有効 grant とする。honest self-grant(issuer==grantee)は無効 grant→その privileged write を violation 検出、GRANT 自体も unauthorized_grants に可視化。残余(正直宣言): GRANT の issuer 欄は self-report ゆえ issuer=root の *詐称* は単一プロセスで検出不能=根が一段下へ移る(Taka『同じ問題が一段下に移る』)。prevention は署名/プロセス分離(AB-0012)まで。併せて property atomicity 反映(Taka): CORRECTION_COMPLETION/transition_legality → CORRECTION/mutation_legality + COMPLETION/mutation_legality + CLAIM_LIFECYCLE/transition_legality(未実装); H3/claim_key_identity → H3/surface_claim_key_canonicalization + H3/semantic_claim_identity
decision: AMEND
amendment_ref: core.CAPABILITY_ISSUERS / issue_capability(issuer) / _valid_grants / _unauthorized_grants。audit_write_authority は有効 grant(authorized issuer)のみ承認し unauthorized_grants を返す
decision_owner: Taka(裁定: self-grant 重要・who may issue grant) + GPT(検出) + Claude Code(実装)

counterexample_ref: JREV-0002 R6(adjudication で §4 外 confirmed gap)
observation: derive_validation_mode は evidence 関係の source_class を集め、PRIMARY 存在→(POSITIVE)DECLARED /(NEGATIVE)SPECIFIED を導出する(gates.py:97-100)。しかし source_class は PRIMARY/SECONDARY/GENERATED の権威次元のみで、Observation kind(declaration / specification / measurement / reproduction)と Activity/run type を持たない。ゆえに authentic PRIMARY でも mode を決定できない: official source code(implementation artifact)を PRIMARY として DECLARED に写像するのは意味的に妙。official formal spec は SPECIFIED、benchmark run は MEASURED、reproduction run は REPRODUCED 候補であり、いずれも PRIMARY たり得る。既存 non_guarantee(contracts.py:106『source_class 真正性 / leaf self-report』)より R6 の射程は広い——正しい PRIMARY でも mode derivation が誤り得る
decision: DEFER_WITH_DECLARED_NONGUARANTEE
amendment_ref: Phase 1a(安全側): DECLARED を『PRIMARY + explicit declaration observation kind』へ狭め、それ以外は UNRESOLVED へ倒す(無理に mode を賢く導出しない)。Phase 1b: F3a provenance_mode_candidate へ回帰し Observation.source.kind / Activity.run_type / Measurement schema / Reproduction link を入力に持つ mode candidate 導出を実装。contracts.py の derive_validation_mode non_guarantee を R6 射程へ拡張(source_class-only 導出は declaration/specification/measurement/reproduction を区別できない)。実装は今すぐ不要、JREV-0003 で再判定

counterexample_ref: JREV-0003 §3-F(local agent 実弾 probe_f.py で fail-open 再現)
observation: local agent(独立 attacker)が §4 外の新規欠陥を検出: polarity が enum 検証も Gate0 必須項目にもなっておらず、未知/欠落/typo('NEGATVE')/None/garbage の polarity が derive_validation_mode の POSITIVE→DECLARED 最特権分岐へ素通りしていた(gates.py は ABSENCE=raise / NEGATIVE=SPECIFIED のみ special-case、他は全て positive fall-through)。apply_outcome も非 ABSENCE を positive 扱いするため mistyped NEGATIVE が positive DECLARED claim として永続化。証拠バーは破らない(依然 PRIMARY+DECLARATION が必要)が、R5/R6 が築いた polarity 特異性(DECLARED/SPECIFIED/ABSENCE 軸)を未知値が迂回する labeling/robustness gap。モジュール自身の原則『既定値の存在自体が誤り』に反して未知値が最特権分岐へ倒れていた

amendment_ref: fail-closed 二重防御: (1) gates.gate0_schema に POLARITY_VALUES enum 検査 + REQUIRED に polarity 追加(未知/欠落を DEFER で上流 reject)、(2) derive_validation_mode で polarity ∉{POSITIVE,NEGATIVE} を UNRESOLVED へ。全 candidate 生成元(run/run2/demo/test)は正規 polarity を設定済ゆえ正常系不変。test_adversarial に F 群 8本(未知 polarity→UNRESOLVED / Gate0 reject / 正規系不変)。test_adversarial 22/22・sor 39/39・enforce 13/13・RC-3/RC-4 PASS。demo の soft spot(C1 statement の port 8005 が adjudicated fragment 非包含=宣言済 hole #4 内)も statement/scope から port 除去で是正

note: provenance: 独立 attacker が検出=driver-honest-replay でない一次証拠。attacker≠author≠adjudicator の三者分業が実際に新規欠陥を捕えた初回(DE-0005 の独立レビュー価値の再実証)。F 修正の最終 verdict は GPT の JREV-0003 裁定(§3 一次資料)。polarity ラベル自体の詐称(正規値を悪意で付す)は source_class/kind と同型の leaf self-report で残余(単一プロセス検出不能)

counterexample_ref: JREV-0003 GPT §6 R7
observation: validation_mode が evidence の epistemic mode(observation_kind)でなく claim の polarity から部分導出。現 derive: NEGATIVE→SPECIFIED(DECLARATION|SPECIFICATION)、POSITIVE→DECLARED(DECLARATION のみ)。ゆえに DECLARATION+NEGATIVE→SPECIFIED、SPECIFICATION+POSITIVE→UNRESOLVED。declaration は polarity に関わらず declaration、specification は polarity に関わらず specification であるべきで、mode と polarity は直交すべき。『公式が非対応と宣言(DECLARED+NEGATIVE)』と『仕様が禁止(SPECIFIED+NEGATIVE)』の混同は NOT_FOUND≠SPECIFIED ABSENCE と同型の再混同
decision: AMEND
amendment_ref: Taka 裁定=直交化採用(2026-07-05)。実装済: derive_validation_mode を observation_kind 駆動へ(DECLARATION→DECLARED / SPECIFICATION→SPECIFIED、polarity 不問)。負の理由は candidate.negative_basis{EXPLICITLY_UNSUPPORTED/SPEC_PROHIBITED/EMPIRICALLY_FAILED/REPRODUCTION_FAILURE}を Gate0 が NEGATIVE claim に enum 必須化。R5 の SPECIFIED=NEGATIVE 専用を supersede(ABSENCE≠SPECIFIED は absence_validation 別軸で維持)。test_sor T8 2x2(T8a/c/g/j)+ adversarial R7 Gate0 3本。sor 41/41・adversarial 25/25

affected_rules: Evidence Relation first-class(設計>実装 gap)
counterexample_ref: JREV-0003 敵対 B の GPT 再解釈(§7 R8)
observation: derive_validation_mode が evidence を関係付き support path でなく袋(global set)として扱う。has_primary の all(c!=GENERATED) は大域 veto で非単調: valid PRIMARY+DECLARATION→DECLARED に無関係な GENERATED 証拠を1件足すだけで UNRESOLVED に落ちる=追加証拠が既存の適格 epistemic 関係を破壊。attacker は B(PRIMARY/DECL+GENERATED/DECL→UNRESOLVED)を DEFENSE_HELD としたが、GPT はこれを『汚染防御』でなく『Evidence を関係でなく袋で見ている』証拠として棄却。LLM 要約/翻訳/過去 task 解決/生成比較ノートが今後蓄積すると、primary support path を持つ claim が supplementary generated artifact の存在だけで mode を失う
decision: AMEND
amendment_ref: derive_validation_mode を袋→eligible typed SUPPORTS path 導出へ。GENERATED path は(a)独立に資格なし=無視(b)別の適格 primary path を大域無効化しない(非 veto)。GENERATED-only は適格 PRIMARY path 不在ゆえ UNRESOLVED(従来通り、gate1 GENERATED-only forbidden も別途)。relation_type==SUPPORTS のみ算入。generated が導出に関与する taint-lineage(DERIVED_FROM_GENERATED/TAINT_RELEVANT)は Phase 1b(大域 any-GENERATED→fail で近似しない)
decision_owner: GPT(再解釈) + Taka(DE-0030 優先指示) + Claude Code(実装)
note: ★最重要(architectural)。設計『Evidence Relation first-class』が Phase 1a 実装より一段先へ行っている場所を attack B が露出。袋→typed support path が意図した終着点。Taka『R8 は本質的、DE-0030 を優先』

experiment_ref: egl/judge_vllm.py + demo_gate4_vllm.py 実モデル敵対ラウンド + test_judge_vllm.py (2026-07-06)
observation: driver-injected Gate4 を実モデル(ローカル Qwen3.6-35B-A3B @ vLLM:8005, OpenAI 互換)裁定へ置換=Phase 1b で初めて実 LLM が判断に入る。judge は bounded evidence context のみから ENTAILMENT(f1)+SCOPE(f2)+fragment_sufficient を JSON で返す。規律=world knowledge を使わない(fragment 未支持なら世界的に真でも NOT_SUPPORTED)。故障と修正: Qwen3 の reasoning-parser 有効時 CoT が token 予算を食い content(answer)が空→全 case fail-safe(EVIDENCE_INSUFFICIENT)。enable_thinking=false + max_tokens 800 で解消。**実モデル敵対ラウンド1回 HELD**: positive→SUPPORTED/WITHIN→Claim、world-knowledge trap(vLLM NVFP4 on Blackwell を general definition fragment に対して)→NOT_SUPPORTED(rationale: fragment に Blackwell/NVFP4 の情報なし)→不受理、scope-exceed(世界最速・全代替超え)→EXCEEDS→不受理。Qwen は NVFP4 対応を世界知識で知る蓋然性が高いが fragment 境界を守った。fail-safe が実証的に効く(統合破損中も false accept ゼロ=fail-closed)
decision: ADOPT

experiment_ref: egl/esde_stream.py + demo_esde_stream.py(live Qwen over ESDE memory corpus, 2026-07-06)

counterexample_ref: Taka 指摘 2026-07-06(ESDE source_class を DE/migration/裁定なしで導入)
observation: ESDE operational stream(DE-0046)で ESDE_SOURCE_CLASSES={PROJECT_STATE/REVIEW_FINDING/SPECIFICATION/INDEX} を RQ を流す準備作業の中で暗黙導入した。これは v0.2 source taxonomy(PRIMARY/SECONDARY/COMMUNITY/GENERATED=provenance/authority 軸)とは *別軸* の record-TYPE ラベルであり、実質 taxonomy の Axis Reboot(AX-5)= migration event + 裁定記録を要する変更が、暗黙に入った=**それ自体がレビュー機構の捕える pathology(変更が discipline を通らず prep に紛れる)の一例**。中身の方向は妥当(ESDE 文書は EGL にとって外部世界の観測対象で LLM 生成を多く含み既存4値に素直に収まらない)。**最重要の線(Taka)**: ESDE 記録を EGL が claim 化する時の根拠は「ESDE 台帳がこう *記録している*」(記録存在=PRIMARY 相当)か「記録の *内容* が真」(LLM 生成内容=GENERATED 相当・ST-3 対象)か——SELF_GROUNDING で開発史を扱った時の DECLARED/adjudicated 分離(SG-E が守った線)と同型。contextual taxonomy がこの線を保存しているか
decision: AMEND_PENDING_GPT_RULING
amendment_ref: 現状分析: ESDE stream は Claim を curator/gate1 経由で admit せず answer 再構成のみ→現時点で ST-3(gate1 の GENERATED-only-forbidden)の literal 迂回は起きていない。ただし(a)taxonomy を DE/裁定なしで入れた governance 違反は成立、(b)ESDE 出力を benchmark B/Claim 化する前(directive §8)に record-存在(PRIMARY)vs record-内容-真偽(GENERATED)の線の enforce が必須。GPT 裁定依頼: この record-TYPE 軸は(i)v0.2 provenance 軸と直交する正当な新軸として認めるか(その場合 axis 定義 + migration event)、(ii)provenance 軸へ mapping すべきか、(iii)ESDE claim 化時に PRIMARY(存在)/GENERATED(内容)を強制する規則。ESDE_SOURCE_CLASSES を PROVISIONAL_PENDING_DE0047 とマーク、RQ2/RQ8 run を PRE_ADJUDICATION stamp(破棄せず、mode_basis 流儀)
decision_owner: Taka(governance 指摘・裁定要求) + GPT(taxonomy 裁定) + Claude Code(自己申告・マーク)
note: 自己申告=著者が自分の governance 違反を台帳化(独立レビュー前の自認、DE-0005 audit_chain の規律)。RQ を流す準備で taxonomy を暗黙変更した=運用速度が discipline を飛ばしかけた実例。残 RQ は taxonomy 裁定と並行して流してよい(Taka: 運用を止めない=放置耐性設計)が、PRE_ADJUDICATION stamp を継続

experiment_ref: EGL Registration Directive — Integrated Architecture v0.3 (Taka, 2026-07-06)
observation: アーキテクチャ(EGL/RRI/DS/DW)の設計決定・システム状態・failure pattern relation・review evidence・open gaps を EGL へ登録する運用 Task を実行。source 実在確認(SG-G): SRC-C(phase-1b-acquisition-boundary.md)は EGL 正本として既存=reuse existing ref、重複登録しない。SRC-A(AI_DEVELOPMENT_ARCHITECTURE_EGL_RRI_DS_DW_v0_1.md)/ SRC-B(EGL_REQUEST_RESOLUTION_RESEARCH_INTENT_SPEC_v0_2.md)は on-disk に不在=SOURCE_UNAVAILABLE(捏造せず不達を surface)。directive 自体は本 session の Taka decision record(conversation artifact)で、登録の present な primary basis。登録 scope は RECORD_OCCURRENCE(これらの決定/状態/gap が *記録された*)であって subsystem implementation truth でない(VALIDATION_TARGET/DE-0051 の線)。SRC-A/B の document status=PROPOSED/DESIGN SPECIFICATION、implementation fact へ昇格しない。
decision: REGISTER

counterexample_ref: Taka formal verdict on REVIEW_PACKET_TAXONOMY_DE0047.md (2026-07-06, packet 精査済)
observation: DE-0047 taxonomy の正式裁定(Taka、packet 本文を見た上で)。Option 1 ADOPT(provenance/source_class と直交する新軸として validation_target を置く、軸名は packet taxonomy に合わせ RECORD_OCCURRENCE/CONTENT_ASSERTION/BEHAVIORAL_PROPERTY)。Option 3 semantics を **mandatory claimization discipline** に(record exists/states X と、X is true/implementation behaves as X を別 claim として扱う)。Option 2 REJECT(record type→provenance mapping は category conflation: PROJECT_STATE record だから PRIMARY とは限らず、GENERATED artifact でも『その artifact が X と述べた』record occurrence は直接観測対象になり得る=直交軸)。
decision: ADOPT
amendment_ref: DE-0051 の provisional VALIDATION_TARGET 実装(egl/validation_target.py)を PROVISIONAL→ADOPTED へ昇格。ESDE_TAXONOMY_STATUS を ADOPTED に更新。Option 3 を claimization 時の必須規律(ESDE 出力を Claim 化する時、basis を RECORD_OCCURRENCE に限定し、CONTENT_ASSERTION/BEHAVIORAL_PROPERTY は別 evidence path を要求)。一文: Option 1 adopted / Option 3 mandatory / Option 2 rejected as category conflation。
decision_owner: Taka(adjudicator、packet 精査) + Claude Code(記録・code 昇格)
note: 著者≠裁定者: 裁定は Taka、著者は記録に留める。DE-0051 の provisional 実装が正式裁定でほぼ confirm された(軸・線とも一致)。

counterexample_ref: DE-0054 discrepancy finding / Taka verdict (2026-07-06)
observation: DE-0054 が surface した DD-ARCH-2(epistemic-ledger=EGL+RRI 同居)と実 repo(RRI 独立=request-resolution-intent)の不整合を裁定。Taka verdict: 現在の repo 実態を CURRENT にする。理由は『もう作ったから』でなく責任分離として独立が自然(RRI=Raw Request/Intent/Research Design/Approved RQ Set vs EGL=Acquisition/Observation/Evidence/Claim/Admission、かなり違う)。特に RRI を DW workload として開発する時、RRI が epistemic-ledger 内だと DW の変更 scope が EGL 内部へ漏れ得る。独立 repo なら contract(RRI→EGL: APPROVED_RQ_SET / EGL→RRI: Knowledge State/Gap/Failure Pattern refs)が明確。
decision: SUPERSEDE
amendment_ref: DD-ARCH-2 の repository strategy proposition は SUPERSEDED。CURRENT: epistemic-ledger=EGL / request-resolution-intent=RRI / dev-workcell=DW / dialogue-state-continuity=DS。この repository separation は current development boundaries を確立するが、future deployment topology / service boundaries を固定しない(narrow)。supersession target=DD-ARCH-2 の repo-strategy proposition のみ(DE-0054 artifact 全体でない)。SRC-A §12『RRI should remain in the EGL repository as a separate module』も同 proposition として superseded。
note: registration の independent-review が捕えた discrepancy を自己裁定せず上申→Taka 裁定→CURRENT 更新、という規律の一巡。

experiment_ref: AB-0023 実装 + SGQ-R5/R6 counter-factual rerun (Taka 裁定, 2026-07-06)
observation: Taka 裁定に沿い AB-0023 を『fixed record injection でなく domain coverage RULE』で実装。SELF_GROUNDING query を最小 class(OPEN_GAP_QUERY/AUTONOMY_GATE_STATUS/PROPERTY_HISTORY/GENERAL)へ分類し、class ごとに required ledger domain を versioned mapping(sg-coverage-v1)。OPEN_GAP/AUTONOMY は AUDIT_BACKLOG を候補集合へ。AUTONOMY は ACQ-10 gate-condition lineage(A=JREV-0005/B=JREV-0006/C=DE-0042・JREV-0007/D=DE-0039・0040/overall=DE-0056)を retrieval ranking に依らず force_include。required domain 不在 → answer path DEFER(silent reconstruction 禁止、Qwen も呼ばない)。SGQ 再走: R5 は GAP-RRI-1/XB-1/EGL-1/DW-1 を実 retrieve(以前は audit_backlog 非包含で不可)、R6 は D を DE-0039/0040 引用で正しく再構成し『未完了/保留』regression を解消(disabled は C one-round + overall 由来と正しく帰属)。両者 M1/M2/M3 pass・src_trace 1.00。
decision: ADOPT
amendment_ref: self_grounding: LEDGER_DOMAINS / _load_domain / load_corpus(domains) / QUERY_CLASS_DOMAINS / ACQ10_CONDITION_LINEAGE / classify_query / build_candidate_corpus / answer_with_coverage / answer_question(force_include)。test_self_grounding AB-0023 9本(hermetic: classify/domain 包含/force_include/DEFER)。challenge_baseline 再走(fingerprint e58e8a76)。SELF_GROUNDING 専用、EGL Research へ即一般化しない(Taka)。failure pattern INCOMPLETE_EPISTEMIC_CANDIDATE_SET を **CANDIDATE として記録**(admission せず): 『下流 grounding/state 再構成が retrieved record を正しく処理するが、関連 ledger/object class が retrieval candidate universe の外にあるため load-bearing な current record を落とす』。今 2 件(audit_backlog absent→open gaps missed / DE-0039-0040 retrieval miss→ACQ-10 D regression)ゆえ即 admission でなく candidate。
decision_owner: Taka(裁定・domain coverage 方針・failure pattern candidate) + Claude Code(実装・実測)
note: Taka の核心指摘: correct classification on incomplete candidate set。分類器が正しくても候補集合に record が無ければ無理=一段下の問題。RRI の Research Design(何を答えるかで何を見るか先に決める)と同型の穴が EGL SELF_GROUNDING 内部で出た。修正は record 固定注入でなく query-class→required-domain rule。EGL 巨大化を避け SELF_GROUNDING 専用で狭く。

affected_rules: EGL は DW を無条件に信じない (DE-0005)
experiment_ref: egl/result_packet.py ingest of DW RESULT_PACKET TASK-RRI-001 (RRI first slice) with EGL independent re-verification (2026-07-06, bootstrap DD-ARCH-3 step 6)
observation: DW→EGL 還流を実装・実行(認知スタック loop の帰路)。DW が返した RESULT_PACKET(TASK-RRI-001, proposed_claims のみ)を EGL の通常 admission 規律で ingest。核心規律を実証: EGL は DW の self-reported test_result を behavioral truth として無条件に信じない(DE-0005)。VALIDATION_TARGET(DE-0059)で分離: (1)RECORD_OCCURRENCE『DW RESULT_PACKET が完了と 11 passing を記録した』= 記録存在(PRIMARY evidence=file)→ ADMITTED。(2)BEHAVIORAL_PROPERTY『select_strategy が tested cases を通る』= EGL が RRI test suite を **独立に再実行**(import せず subprocess, 17/17 PASS=DW の 11 より広い scope)して初めて VERIFIED。再検証なしなら REPORTED に留まる設計。(3)over-claim = REJECTED(本 packet は DW が scope を narrow に切っており該当なし)。gap『axis assessment(text→4軸)未実装』→ open gap。
decision: ADOPT
amendment_ref: egl/result_packet.py(ingest_result_packet: RECORD_OCCURRENCE/BEHAVIORAL_PROPERTY/over-claim を validation_target で分離、reverify で独立再検証)+ test_result_packet.py 8/8。admitted: RECORD_OCCURRENCE=ADMITTED, BEHAVIORAL_PROPERTY=VERIFIED(EGL 独立再実行 17/17, tested-cases scope)。rejected: none。gap: GAP-RRI-5(axis assessment 未実装)。non_guarantees 保持(single-Qwen auditor / tested-scope only / RRI overall は first-slice)。
decision_owner: EGL Claude Code(admission) + Taka(step 6 指示)。DW は確定に関与しない(proposed_claims のみ返す)。
note: loop の帰路が通った: DS(記録)→RRI(解釈, DW で実装)→EGL(接地/admit)→DW(実行)→EGL(還流)。EGL が DW の test_result を鵜呑みにせず自ら再実行した点が肝=著者(DW)≠裁定者(EGL)を repo 境界で enforce。RRI overall は依然 first-slice(この admission は tested-cases scope の behavioral property のみ)。

experiment_ref: docs/report/ai_work_system_loop_demo.py — 1 request を 4層に通し loop を閉じる (2026-07-06, bootstrap DD-ARCH-3 step 9=最終)
observation: Full loop を実演: request『さっきの Context Binding、実装して』を DS→RRI→EGL→DW→EGL→DS に通し loop が閉じた。層間は versioned packet(dict 契約)でのみ結線(module 内部に触れない)。trace: (1)DS→DIALOGUE_STATE_PACKET(2 thread, state付き)。(2)RRI Context Binding が DS packet を消費し『さっきの Context Binding』を thread T3 に解決(mode=DIALOGUE_STATE, anchoring=HIGH, refs=[T3])→ select_strategy=CONTEXT_RESOLVE。(3)EGL→KNOWLEDGE_PACKET(bridge)。(4)DW workcell が independent-audit gate を通過し COMPLETE→RESULT_PACKET(proposed_claims のみ)。(5)EGL が RESULT_PACKET を admit: RECORD_OCCURRENCE=ADMITTED / BEHAVIORAL_PROPERTY=VERIFIED(独立再検証)/ rejected=0。(6)DS が DIALOGUE_EVENT(PROVISIONAL, transition=CONTINUE)を記録し loop 閉。各接合部で規律が保持: DS 状態解決 / RRI 過剰構造化・過剰解釈回避 / DW 独立監査 gate / EGL が DW を無条件に信じず再検証。
decision: ADOPT
amendment_ref: real junctions(全て既実装): DS packet(DS DE-0003)/ RRI Context Binding+strategy(RRI DE-0002/0003)/ EGL admission(DE-0063)/ DW gate(DW DE-0001..0003)。honest bridges(未実装、stub と明示): RRI Research Design→APPROVED_RQ_SET(RRI §21-29)=GAP-XB-2、EGL KNOWLEDGE_PACKET emitter=GAP-XB-3。demo は docs/report/ai_work_system_loop_demo.py に保存(production の integration 層は MOR で deferred=5個目 repo を今は作らない。step 9 が real emitter/Research Design の必要を surface)。
decision_owner: Claude(loop orchestration demo) + Taka(step 9 指示)。各層は自分の repo・自分の規律を保持。
note: bootstrap 完了(step 1-9)。認知スタック 4層が実装され、1 request で end-to-end に連携し、各接合で規律が効くことを実演。scope 正直に: これは *配線と規律* の実演であって、単一 Qwen での full autonomy や DW effectiveness の証明ではない(それらは NOT_PROVEN のまま)。2 bridge(GAP-XB-2/3)を埋めれば bridge なしの full loop になる=次の deliberate build。

affected_rules: ODF candidate narrowing through real DW workcell
minimality test vs LLM audit complementarity
experiment_ref: experiments/run_odf_narrow.py — real dw/workcell.py dogfood (2026-07-07)
observation: ODF-02 の over-scoped 候補を、独立 audit が露出させた minimality/trust-root 問題で狭め、実 dw/workcell.py を dogfood して実装候補へ昇格を試みた。設計タスク用 load-bearing test=決定的 minimality check(≤2 fields / declared trust-root / presence≠sufficiency / one escalation rule / forbidden scope 除外)。GENERATE(Qwen3.6)→ minimality test → AUDIT(独立 Qwen3.6 別 identity)→ REGENERATE×2 → re-AUDIT。結果: 設計は minimal に収束(2 fields: human_declaration + escalation_trigger、escalate-if-declaration-NULL、DW は adequacy を判定せず human 宣言を機械適用)、**決定的 minimality test は PASS**。だが独立 audit が **substantive な残 gap** を継続検出——(1)trust root が宣言の *presence* のみ扱い *validity/staleness* を扱わない、(2)human_declaration の内容未定義で scope 再流入余地——ゆえ rework threshold 超で **JUDGE_REQUIRED**。gate は COMPLETE を拒否し Exceptional Adjudicator へ escalate。
decision: ESCALATE_TO_ADJUDICATOR
amendment_ref: narrowing は structural minimality を達成(deterministic test PASS)したが、LLM audit が意味的 trust-root gap(presence≠validity、宣言内容未定義)を捕捉=**構造テストと LLM audit は相補(structure vs semantics)**。single-Qwen auditor は bottleneck でなく real issue を出した。gate は auto-promote せず JUDGE_REQUIRED(DW 設計通り Exceptional Adjudicator=Taka/GPT へ)。**実装候補は存在するが未昇格**——未解決の tension: minimal な presence-only 宣言で足りるか、宣言の validity/staleness 処理を足すか(後者は scope 増)。これは人が決める設計判断。packet=odf_narrow_result.json。
decision_owner: DW loop(Qwen worker+auditor, real workcell gate) + Claude Manager → JUDGE_REQUIRED ゆえ Taka/GPT 裁定待ち
note: honest: DW gate が deterministic test PASS でも LLM audit 未 clean なら promote しない(F5+独立監査の合流)。narrowing は成功(minimal 到達)だが promotion は Exceptional Adjudicator の判断——「presence-only で最小実装するか、validity/staleness を足すか」。DW dogfooding が実タスクで JUDGE_REQUIRED 経路を初めて踏んだ(自己完了しない証明)。

experiment_ref: ODF-01 → ODF-02(clean) → narrowing(JUDGE_REQUIRED) → Taka 裁定 → ASSIGNMENT_AUTHORIZATION 実装 (DW DE-0005) (2026-07-07)
observation: ODF 系を一旦 close。系列: Phase0(O4 reach baseline)→ ODF-01(PARTIAL_POSITIVE, contamination 有)→ ODF-02(clean replication で PARTIAL_POSITIVE confirm, H3=H4=0)→ narrowing(実 DW workcell dogfood, deterministic minimality PASS だが独立 audit が substantive gap → JUDGE_REQUIRED, 自己完了せず escalate)→ Taka(Exceptional Adjudicator)が authorization model を裁定 → DW に ASSIGNMENT_AUTHORIZATION 最小実装。
decision: CLOSE_ODF
amendment_ref: 成果: system は observed problem だけから中間設計 need を(clean で)形成でき、独立 audit が minimality/trust-root を gate し、人裁定で最小 authorization へ着地=**設計形成の実験結果が実 human-intervention 削減に繋がった**(assignment clarification 0)。DW DE-0005 の load-bearing test で確認。学び: (1)design need の自己形成は narrow に YES(ODF-02 clean)。(2)minimality-discipline は formation では保てず独立 audit が root of trust。(3)DW loop は JUDGE_REQUIRED で自己完了しない(gate 尊重)。次(Taka 指示順): RRI 本実装を DW で継続(Coder-Next=CODING_WORKER, Qwen3.6=audit)→ EGL 蓄積 → 十分な対話履歴後に DS crossover benchmark → RRI 完成で ESDE 復帰。
decision_owner: Taka(裁定・順序) + Claude Code(実装・記録)
note: 目的は自己改善システムを眺めることでなく最終的に ESDE 開発へ戻ること(Taka)。ODF は「4-system が中間設計を発生させられるか」を narrow に肯定しつつ、実運用の1点(assignment clarification)を実際に閉じた。実装候補(narrowed design)は authorization model に置換され、trust-root/validity tension は authorization の issued_by + append-only revoke で解消。

affected_rules: Sleep Mode wake broken on our config
experiment_ref: run_sleep_wake_measure.py + clean single-cycle (Taka authorized local measurement, 2026-07-07)
observation: vLLM Sleep Mode を実 enable(--enable-sleep-mode + VLLM_SERVER_DEV_MODE=1)して local wake latency を実測。**clean 再現結果**: (1)**sleep level-1 は動作** — 5.5s、GPU を 30GB→2GB/GPU(~28GB 解放)、http 200、is_sleeping=True。(2)**wake_up は失敗** — http 500、Worker error "list object has no attribute zero_"(corrupted-state run では CUDA invalid argument at cumem_allocator.cpp:169)。post-wake 生成は timeout、model は stuck asleep で full restart 要。
decision: SLEEP_MODE_NOT_VIABLE_LOCALLY
amendment_ref: wake latency は数値でなく **failure**。docs の DECLARED "fast resume without full model reload" は **local で成立しない**(§5 の local applicability=FALSE, measured)。Sleep Mode は現構成(Qwen3.6-35B-A3B-NVFP4/tp2/expert-parallel/sm_120)で swap 代替に使えない。→ operating-mode 決定では **batching(AC-3)が残る viable path**、Sleep Mode は除外。AEC AC-4: UNRESOLVED→LOCAL_MEASUREMENT/MEASURED。scope: 現 model/config のみ(list.zero_ error は Qwen3-Next-family 固有の可能性)。
decision_owner: local measurement(実測)→ Taka(operating-mode 判断)
note: §5 discipline の決定的実証: docs は SPECIFIED(existence + fast resume を declare)だが、**OUR machine で wake が壊れている**——SPECIFIED を MEASURED 扱いしなかった AEC strength guard が正しかった。sleep 自体は動くので将来 vLLM 修正 or 別 model で再測の価値あり。Qwen3.6 は standard 構成へ restore。

observation: ESDE corpus(概念理解.md)から incident 抽出(10 VERIFIED, gold回収3/7, lesson-copy無)→ Qwen が masked view で構造family induction。**MF-001 Observer-Subject を PROVISIONAL admission**。held-out transfer(N=5, leak制御 pre-frame, TIER-2運用incident4+ESDE1)を A(ordinary)/B(skepticism)/C(lessons)/D(retrieval)/T1(MF-001)/T2(MF-M2 artifact) で実施し missing-axis回収を外部weight採点。

note: 前登録(§25.1)の解釈表に厳密に沿った outcome-neutral 結果。induction成功方向のみで解釈せず。open gap 最大は v9.17 truncation で artifact family が under-populated(3例目未抽出)。report=docs/metaframe_walking_slice_report.md。update-path: MF-001 REVIEW_NEED を append-only 起票。一つの正例で self-improvement を主張しない(§24)。

affected_rules: abstraction cross-domain safety = PROVISIONAL RESEARCH SIGNAL
experiment_ref: mini-C incremental classification probe (2026-07-07)
observation: PHASE 2 の cluster instability は meta-frame の本質的不安定でなく **手続き誤り**だった: 新incident追加時に admitted 概念まで全件 batch re-cluster し hard single-cluster partition を強制していた。mini-C で既存 predicate を固定し新incidentを独立 applicability 分類(multi-membership 許可)した結果、**INC-11 が observer-subject と artifact の両 frame に MATCH**(multi-valued membership)、**artifact family(MF-M2)は incremental 分類で INC-02/11/16 の solid 3件に到達**(batch では hard-partition で消えていた)。

affected_rules: DESIGN NEED: pre-injection applicability / NULL-injection gate

affected_rules: task-state applicability NOT reliably decidable by this gate
representation decision dominates injection decision for safety
experiment_ref: run_gate_pilot.py (§11 回答 baked-in: EGL abstract axis-class taxonomy, gate は frame本体非開示, UNKNOWN→NULL, ground truth 決定的軸, 2026-07-08)
observation: pre-injection gate pilot(N=15)。gate は task state + abstract axis-class LABEL + applicability metadata のみ読む(frame/incident 本体なし)。結果: **NULL_WIN を NO に振れた 1/10**(gate は 14/15 YES=ほぼ常時注入偏り、false-positive 9)、MEMORY_HELPFUL→YES 8/8(YES連発の副産物)、UNKNOWN 0。**XDOMAIN_LITERAL: always-concrete 29 / TREATMENT(gate)0 / always-NULL 0**。
decision: REPRESENTATION_DOMINATES
amendment_ref: **primary Q(NULL-win を注入前に NO へ振れるか)= 達成せず**(この first-cut gate は over-inject、task-state signal を Qwen が読むと『どこかに gap あり→inject』へ偏る)。前登録の『gate ≈ CONTROL B(always inject): task-state signal が discriminate しない、injection は gateable でない(この設計では)』に整合。**但し最重要発見**: gate が YES 時に abstract_v2 を注入するため TREATMENT の literal 誤射=0(=always-NULL、<<always-concrete 29)。→ **representation 判定(abstract)が injection 判定より safety を支配。弱い injection-gate は abstract representation で救われる。2 decision 分離が経験的に支持**。実用含意: 『常時 abstract』の価値 > 完璧な injection-gate。injection-gate の残る価値は compute/冗長性で safety でない。
note: 非主張: これは1 gate 設計(Qwen判定, YES偏り)。stricter/trained gate なら discriminate し得る。pre-injection applicability が un-decidable とは確立せず、この first-cut が discriminate しないだけ。self-improvement claim 作らず。ground truth は決定的軸(class既présence / XDOMAIN_LITERAL)、Qwen HIT は未使用。

experiment_ref: gate pilot (DE-0095) + Round B v2 (DE-0092/0093) → Taka 裁定 (b) (2026-07-08)
observation: operational 裁定: 外部 memory/incident/meta-frame を cross-domain 転移する際は **常に abstract representation で提示する**(生 incident 本体を main reasoning へ注入しない)。**pre-injection injection-gate は放棄**。
decision: ADOPT_ALWAYS_ABSTRACT_ABANDON_GATE
amendment_ref: 根拠: gate pilot(DE-0095)で (1)first-cut injection-gate は discriminate しない(NULL-win を NO へ 1/10、over-inject)、(2)但し gate が YES 時 abstract を注入するため literal 誤射 0(=always-NULL、<<always-concrete 29)=**representation 判定が injection 判定より safety を支配**。→ injection-gate を作る代わりに『常時 abstract』を採る方が safety に効き、かつ単純。**policy**: RRI が library frame/incident を axis 形成に使う時、meta-frame は applicability predicate + suggested axes(既に abstract)、生 incident は MASK_PIPELINE v2(seal 2bfd70f9)で abstract 化してから。concrete incident 本体は main reasoning へ入れない。design need DE-0094 を **RESOLVED(injection-gate 不採用、always-abstract 採用)**。plan pre_injection_gate_plan_v0.1 は SUPERSEDED。
note: scope 正直に: always-abstract は **safety policy**(literal cross-domain 誤射を 0 化)であって performance-boost でない——pilot は memory 転移が common-instinct task で NULL を上回らないことも示した。memory 転移が subtle task で NULL を超えるか(Round1 HO-1 示唆)は別問題で未確立。injection-gate の残余価値(compute/冗長性回避)は追わない。self-improvement claim 作らず。

affected_rules: redundancy 判定は LLM 自由判断で不十分

observation: DE-0095 の ground_truth_null_win は 2 概念を混在: (a)base が既に target axis を回収(=redundancy, gate が原理的に観測可能)、(b)concrete representation が literal 害を導入(=gate は memory 本文を見ないので原理的に観測不能)。**gate 能力評価では両者を分離すべき**。(b)由来(B04/B08/B12/B13/B14: base_has_target=false かつ concrete_xdom>0)を gate 失敗に数えるのは不公平。

affected_rules: full-predicate meta-frame provisional value on subtle tasks
experiment_ref: run_roundc.py + Claude external-weight scoring (N=45=15×3, stratified BASE_HAS_TARGET, preregistered docs/roundc_preregistration.md, 2026-07-08)
observation: 3-arm value experiment(A0 NULL / A1 ABSTRACT_V2 incident / A2 FULL-PREDICATE MF-002)、BASE_HAS_TARGET で層別、外部weight(Claude)採点。**TRUE層(5)**: A0 HIT5/IRREL0, A1 HIT3/IRREL3/OVER1, A2 HIT4/IRREL0。**FALSE層(10)**: A0 HIT6/IRREL0, A1 HIT4/IRREL7/OVER5, **A2 HIT9/IRREL0/OVER0**。
decision: FULL_PREDICATE_HAS_PROVISIONAL_VALUE
amendment_ref: **RQ-C2 満たされた**: FALSE 層で full-predicate meta-frame(HIT 9)> NULL(6)> abstract-incident(4)、IRRELEVANT/OVER-TRIGGER ともに 0 → 前登録『FULL META > NULL and ≥ ABSTRACT without higher irrelevant cost → full-predicate frame has provisional value on subtle missing-axis tasks』に合致。**RQ-C3 満たされた**: A2 は A1 より IRRELEVANT 劇減(0 vs 7)、構造保持で domain 語再導入なし。**RQ-C1(dilution)= A1 が該当**: masked-incident が redundant で希釈(TRUE HIT3/IRREL3)・subtle で誤射(FALSE IRREL7/OVER5)。→ **value 勝者は最も抽象的な full-predicate、masked-incident は value 最下位**。DE-0091 の abstraction-degree(full-predicate>masked-incident)を **value 軸でも確認**。
note: **caveat(過剰主張回避)**: (a)held-out が artifact-family task 主体で MF-002 applicability に高適合 → A2 の勝ちは高適合条件下(meta-frame が助ける正しい条件だが general value 証明でない)。(b)stratification は gate pilot の Qwen 由来で noisy(A0 が FALSE 層で HIT6=Qwen が base_has_target を過小判定)。(c)外部weight=Claude 単一 scorer、Qwen secondary 未実行(前登録で optional)。XDOMAIN_LITERAL は sanity(A2=1, A1=0, 主仮説でない)。self-improvement claim 作らず。value は『高適合の subtle task で full-predicate frame が help』に限定。

experiment_ref: AFE spec v0.2 §32-33 pre-implementation plan (Taka issued, GPT synthesis, 2026-07-08)
observation: AFE(Axiomatic Frame Engine)= 複数の narrow ontological operator を incident frame へ並列適用し missing dimension/distinction/relation の候補を生成する構造推論 engine。目的: 『frame が間違っていると気づけ』という不可能命令を narrow probe(対称/対等/相互依存/階層/軸/了解/創造/既知未知)へ分解し、独立実行→convergence を見る。Taka H3/H4 介入の frame-expansion を部分自動化できるか。

amendment_ref: **HIT: D(AFE)=9 > B(skepticism)=8 >> F(placebo)=3 > A(ordinary)=2 = E(source)=2 > C(meta-frame)=1**。weighted(H+0.5P): B=14.0 ~ D=13.0 > A=9 > C=6=F=6 > E=3。**判定**: (1)**AFE は ordinary/meta-frame/direct-source/placebo を上回る**が、(2)**generic skepticism(B)を明確に上回らない = 主仮説(§23)NOT clearly demonstrated**——B は強い baseline。(3)**positive: AFE(9) >> placebo(3) = operator content が ensemble machinery を超える(AFE-R17 confound 排除)**。(4)**positive: compiled operators(D 9)>> raw source(E 2, over-trigger 20/24)= compilation が source 直曝を圧倒(AC-2 validate)、E は philosophical prose inflation(AFE-R1)の実例**。(5)D は SIGNAL/NO_SIGNAL discipline で AH-14/22(process/曖昧)に 0/6 適切 abstain、E の哲学的暴走を回避。
note: D の弱点: orchestrator JSON leak(複数 incident)、artifact incident の一部で B/C に負け(terse structural label が曖昧)。§28 operator pruning は per-operator contribution trace 未計算で保留。process cost: 6 concurrent 2.26s(安価)。**narrow conclusion**: AFE は ensemble machinery/raw source/ordinary/meta-frame より価値ありだが、『be skeptical, find what could be wrong』を超える ontological operator 固有価値は未実証。self-improvement / metacognition claim 作らず(AC-29)。

observation: DE-0103 の B vs D 未決は scorer が各条件を1 H/P/M/N 単位で見て個別 axis を採点しなかったため(1useful+2irrel と 2useful+1irrel が同 P)。既存 output を 348 axis へ分解し blind axis-level 採点(TARGET_MATCH/USEFUL_NOVEL/IRRELEVANT/OVER_TRIGGER/UNSUPPORTED/AMBIGUOUS)。
decision: PRECISION_RECALL_TRADEOFF
amendment_ref: **external-weight(load-bearing)**: B(skepticism) axis_precision 0.90 / recall 19/24 / problematic 7(AH-22 を security incident と誤読 3 IRRELEVANT + AH-24 refusal 2 UNSUPPORTED)。D(AFE) axis_precision 0.962 / recall 13/24 / **problematic 0(irrelevant/over/unsupported ゼロ)**。**Qwen secondary(TARGET_MATCH 寛容で inflated だが方向一致)**: B prec 0.929 recall 22 / D prec 1.0 recall 20。**判定**: どの preregistered 分岐も clean に発火せず = **genuine PRECISION-RECALL TRADEOFF**。D は precision/safety advantage(clean, zero irrelevant/over/unsupported)だが recall が低い(target を捕える incident が少ない)。B は wider net(recall 高)だが noisy(誤読・refusal)。afe_precision_advantage は『useful recovery preserved』条件を満たさず(recall 13<19)不成立、afe_overconstrains は D に safety advantage があり不成立。
note: **含意: AFE と generic skepticism は補完的(一方が他方を支配しない)**。AFE=low-noise/precise な frame-expansion generator、skepticism=high-recall/high-noise baseline。自然な次設計=skepticism の recall と AFE の precision discipline の hybrid。retained: E harmful(over-trigger)、F insufficient、compiled>>placebo、meta-frame self-select unresolved-fail。**attribution gap**: この run の FEC は source_operator_refs を持たず §27 per-operator contribution 再構成不可(future run で必須化済、DE 記録)。CREATION の usefulness を SIGNAL 2/24 だけから推論しない。self-improvement claim 作らず(AC-29)。

experiment_ref: AFE hybrid (skepticism-generate + AFE-discipline filter) test on existing outputs, preregistered (2026-07-08)
observation: DE-0104 の precision-recall tradeoff を hybrid で解けるか。Stage1=既存 B(skepticism, recall)、Stage2=AFE discipline filter(basis+relevance+reject irrelevant/over/unsupported)を新規適用。
decision: HYBRID_HARDER_THAN_FILTER
amendment_ref: **hybrid-via-filter = FAILED**: naive 同一モデル(Qwen)discipline filter は noise 2/7 しか落とさず(AH-22 security 誤読は frame 曖昧ゆえ filter も同じ blind spot を共有)、target を 2 over-filter → HYBRID recall 18 / precision 0.924 / problematic 5 ≈ B(7)= 精製効かず。前登録 filter_ineffective 分岐に該当。**理由**: D の precision は generation 規律(narrow structural operator が noise を出さない)由来で、後段 filter で回復不可。**hybrid-via-union = 真の lever**: D∪B recall = **20/24**(B 19 / D 13 より高い、D が AH-08 を固有に足す)。どちらも未回収=AH-12/14/22/24(tautology/process-axis/ambiguous/subject-misassign, 最難)。
note: **honest 結論: precision-recall tradeoff は generation-union で recall を上げられる(20/24)が、naive post-hoc filter では precision を回復できない(生成側と blind spot 共有)**。動く precision filter には generator と直交する signal が必要(例: deterministic refusal-detection で AH-24 捕捉、domain-grounding には incident の実 domain 情報)。次設計: (1)D+B union 生成 + (2)deterministic refusal/format 除去 + (3)cross-operator 構造照合。self-improvement claim 作らず。

amendment_ref: **4/5 仮説が現状 unsupportable**(H_recon: S1+S2+S3+S4+S5 / H_scheduler: S7+S9 / H_structure: S6)。**最重要(presented-as-sound な validity hole)**: **S1** in-experiment baseline 欠如(R3 は scheduler control であって HBB『no arm reached』の in-harness 再現でない → 陽性が harness/budget drift か reconstruction stage か attribution 不能。fix=R0 baseline を同 harness・等 budget で追加、H_recon: R_success>R0)。**S2** anti-overfit guarantee が false: STRUCTURAL PROJECTION selector(T0→operator routing)が未凍結・author 定義で、その author は 3 target を知る → 『frozen refs ⇒ no overfit』は routing-to-targets を防がない(hard-core 先固定は targets-to-scheduler のみ防ぐ。fix=exhaustive 適用 or disjoint calibration set で selector 凍結 or target-blind 第三者)。**S3** consensus≈GPT: 『GPT-bound』caveat を prereg が drop、REC2 陽性では consensus=GPT 単独 → instrument_2 が制御すべき単一 scorer 分散が復活(fix=GPT drop に robust=Qwen 単独も REC2 / 第三 scorer / 『GPT-certified』と正直改称)。**S4** 『H0-autonomous』が H1 再命名: detection 段が defect locus を渡す(R1/R3/R4)= HBB Verdict2 の H1 hint 相当 → 陽性が H1-assisted の再バッジになりうる(fix=autonomous 主張を R2 のみに限定、R1/R3/R4 は assisted 分類)。**S5** bar が p-hackable(~45 stochastic cell を max、bar=1、seed 集約/floor/multiplicity 未定義。fix=≥⌈M/2⌉ seed + floor(R0)+ α 固定 + 単一 primary condition)。**S6** R5 lossy が circular(mask が再構成に必要な内容を除去 → R5≪R4 は構成上自明、非診断。fix=graded lossy ladder + manipulation check + 絶対到達で再定義)。**S7** matched-budget=best-of-N confound(等 budget で R4=N 浅 pass vs R3=1 深 pass。fix=best-of-N control 追加、H_scheduler=R4>max(R3,best-of-N))。**S9** 等 token budget + lossy 小入力 → R5 が R4 より多 pass=『差は T0 のみ』矛盾(fix=pass 数も一致)。**⟨TC⟩ param 定義は必要だが不十分**: S1/S2/S3/S4 は param を全て埋めても残る validity hole。

amendment_ref: **fix(v0.4.2)= no-author-selection 原則を全 selection に拡張(B1-(i) の一般化)**: どの condition も author 選択をしない;各 condition は候補を全 emit(R4=全演算子×全 pass pool / R2=全 N frame / R_bon=全 N sample / R0/R1/R3/R5 同様)、cross-pass も pool(best-pass の author 選択なし)、generation prompt は凍結・target-blind・T0-only・seed 変動のみ。**target-held-out 独立 scorer が全候補採点、REC2 到達 = いずれか 1 候補が consensus 認証**。→ 選択を全て target-blind scorer 側へ移し、leak#2 を primary(R2)含め全 path で param 非依存に除去。any-of-N inflation は全 condition 同一処理 + R0 floor(H_recon=R2>R0)で統制、budget は全 pass 完走保証(partial pass なし)。§2/§5.3/§10 を reconcile。 **S7 は再 open せず**(exhaustive 完走 budget を全 condition 同一 total に配ると R_bon が強い control になり保守的方向)。caveat: 等 token ≠ 等 utility(R4 は budget を飽和)→ H_scheduler margin に併記。

amendment_ref: **残 1(patchable)= any-of-N floor fairness**: endpoint が best-of-N(≥1/N certified、N 単調増)。§6 は total token のみ一致し **R0↔R2 の候補数 N を未固定**;R2 の per-candidate 生成が安いと R2 が多く draw → reconstruction でなく N で reach 上昇。S3(GPT-bound consensus)を増幅(候補多 → strict GPT の FP variance で 1 つ通る率↑)。fix=§9 で N-parity 凍結(token でなく候補数一致)。 **残 2(structural, ROOT CAUSE)= target-aware GENERATION authorship**: routing(r2/r3)と selection(r3/r4)を除いた後、著者制御面は **generation** のみ — Claude が {08,10,30}(その breakthrough_structure を著した=DE-0115 caveat)を知りつつ **ref-operator set(§5.2)と R2 生成 prompt** を著す。§2 の guard は『frozen + non-referencing + T0-only + seed』= **round-2 が leak#2 に対し却下した弱い bar**(真の fix は target-blind authorship OR disjoint calibration set)。pure-exhaustive は covert promotion を止めるが、**target-hitting 演算子を frozen set に含める=set composition による overfit** は止まらない。§11 ⟨TC⟩#2 は『ref set membership』を benign param と誤ラベル(実は who authors + target-blind か= validity 問題)。§10『author=機構のみ』と Claude が targets を知りつつ content を著す事実が tension。 **rounds 2→3→4 は同一 signature**: overfit DOF が routing→selection→generation と hop、guard は弱い frozen/non-referencing のまま。per-knob patch は次 knob を出し続ける。**構造的終端 = authorship を target 知識から decouple**。

decision: RECORD_NONVALIDITY_ADD_PROCESS_OBSERVATION_CHANNEL_PROPOSAL
amendment_ref: **program-level 監査(最重要, Taka 指示で先行)= なぜ system は自らの実行異常を Taka のframe変更まで気づけなかったか**: (1)operating frame が **validity-monocular**(6 audit round・spec fidelity・leakage・claim scope・exhaustive completion は全て validity;process 監視ゼロ)。(2)**GPU-busy を throughput-efficient と混同**(TP=2 で単一 serial request が両 GPU 飽和 → util は batch 効率の false positive;req/s・tok/s を導出せず)。(3)**runtime 期待 baseline 不在**(『concurrency C なら X 分』を見積もらず、比較対象が無く異常が定義されない)。(4)**唯一関連する viewpoint H-OPS-01(parallelization/batching)は transfer_evidence=[] で一度も自律発火せず**、参照するのは未実装・DW-scoped・post-hoc の Process Optimizer のみ → bespoke harness では構造的に loop 外。(5)**implementation audit すら validity-chartered**(auditor は serial 構造を見たが charter は code-vs-spec 忠実性のみ)→ 観測 frame は charter が決め、全 charter が validity だった。**根**: code を見落としたのでなく、**throughput を charter とする active channel が無く、GPU-busy を効率と誤認し、runtime 期待を作らなかった**。=EGL の『upstream self-report→downstream trust』antipattern を観測層で反復(GPU-util summary を信じ、primitives から throughput を導出せず;Process Optimizer plan §0 が禁じる当のもの)。 **C の判定 = 設計は partial に machinery を規定するが本 incident には不完全(BOTH)**: viewpoint(H-OPS-01)・derive-from-primitives trace(PROCESS_TRACE)・deterministic triggers は設計にあるが、(i)未実装、(ii)DW/codegen-loop scoped で bespoke harness を観測不能、(iii)post-hoc cost で **live な elapsed-vs-expectation / busy-but-low-throughput rule が無く**、req/s・tok/s・effective-concurrency・GPU-util-vs-batching signal がどこにも無い → **live cross-cutting PROCESS_OBSERVATION channel が設計から欠落**。

Neither implements STOP/COMPARE/REBUILD. **Q3**: operator outputs became candidates via binding B-2 rendering; NO stage converts multiple short views into one rebuilt replacement frame — COMPARE+REBUILD never built, never tested. **Q5 narrowest**: R4-as-frozen would test deterministic cumulative multi-operator transformation, NOT temporal granularity/interruption/independent-reread/compare-rebuild. **Instrument defect**: seed ignored for R4 (:106) + deterministic operators => M=10 is one sample x10, zero variance.

R0 decisive outputs are echo/anchoring on the re-quoted attribution sentence ('the provided text is a claim, not the source material'), matching the frozen R0 pre-commitment, NOT a general center-shift. >=1 R0 output scored 0 that plausibly deserved >=1 (single-scorer noise at the margin).
decision: DOWNGRADE_R0_LIFT_NOT_A_SIGNAL
amendment_ref: Supersedes the DE-0134 note calling the R0 lift a 'descriptive hint worth a future properly-powered follow-up'. Corrected reading: within noise (p=0.055 uncorrected; ~0.20 as max-of-4), echo/anchoring artifact on the re-quoted attribution sentence, measured on an already-unfixated base, with single-scorer noise -> do NOT treat R0 as evidence of a center-shift effect. If ever pursued, requires much larger M, multiple scorers, and a base that is actually fixated. The primary result (H_center_shift NOT CONFIRMED) stands and is reinforced.

experiment_ref: twoder/submit.py+webui.py; test_concurrency_and_run_gate.py 7/7; twoder 0b500db
observation: Two scoped fixes. (1) RUN_NEXT HARD-REFUSE: /api/run_next dispatched on any task_id with no context check -> after a DEAD-APPROACH BLOCK or a non-runnable (observe) submit, the UI (and any direct API call) could advance the stale GPU task. Root: UI button-disabling only, no backend gate. FIX: webui tracks _LAST submit context {blocked,runnable,task_id} under a lock; /api/run_next|run_until_barrier REFUSE (return {refused:true,blocked,reason}, no dispatch, no DW state transition) when blocked or not runnable or task-mismatch; dispatch serialized under the lock (no concurrent double-dispatch); frontend no longer defaults the run target to GPU, tracks RUNNABLE, surfaces backend refusal. (2) TRACE CONCURRENCY: TRACE was a module-global reset per submit -> concurrent submits clobbered each other; trace file non-atomic; a shared /tmp/2der_submit_trace.json overwritten by every submit. FIX: TRACE thread-local (per-request); atomic trace writes (temp + os.replace) with unique per-submit key + stable per-task file; removed the shared /tmp write. VERIFIED live: run_next after BLOCK -> refused, GPU regenerate_runs unchanged; run_until_barrier after BLOCK -> refused; run_next from non-runnable observe -> refused; 4 concurrent submits -> no error, each trace valid JSON + matches its own input (no cross-contamination). Regressions run-gate+concurrency 7/7, dead-approach 8/8, recurrence 8/8, guard 11/11. GPU untouched (READY_FOR_REGENERATE, regenerate_runs=0).
replication_status: FIXED+REGRESSION+LIVE_E2E. run-gate is a single-process in-memory _LAST guarded by a lock (single-user tailnet UI); a persisted/token-scoped gate is a possible future hardening but not needed now.
decision: ADOPT. run_next is direct-API-safe under BLOCK; TRACE concurrency-safe. Scope held: no RRI/detector/GPU-resume/recurrence change. This closes the two tracked follow-ups; remaining backlog is thin.
note: Do not resume GPU. twoder now on github.com/takasan-aruism/twoder (private) at 0b500db. self-improvement claim なし. C!=H.

observation: Taka-approved SLEEP_MODE_NOFP8 experiment (fp8-kv REMOVED, --enable-sleep-mode KEPT). VRAM headroom checked first. MEASURED FACTS: (1) swap ok, NO OOM without fp8-kv; startup 222.1s cold load; gpu_after_load 29956+30283 MiB (~same, 0.92 util cap). (2) SLEEP (level=1): POST 200 in 5.5s, is_sleeping=true, gpu 29956+30283 -> 1704+2031 MiB = FREED ~28GB/GPU. (3) WAKE: POST 200 in 0.5s, is_sleeping=false, gpu restored 29976+30303 MiB, generation recovery OK. (4) ROLLBACK to serve_qwen36_vllm.sh: health restored 186s, generation OK, config_restored=true (fp8-kv back), gpu 29568+29893. DIRECT CONTRAST with DE-0168 (fp8-kv KEPT + sleep): there sleep did NOT free VRAM and wake HUNG. HERE (fp8-kv dropped): sleep frees ~28GB and wake is fast + generation recovers. => the --kv-cache-dtype fp8 flag was the blocker for sleep-mode on this build (consistent with #39078).

decision: RECORD facts only. Do NOT declare bottleneck-solved or co-serve-impossible (BROAD_CLAIM = REQUIRES_APPROVAL, not asserted). experiment_ref: twoder/runs/gpu_experiment/full_swap_result.json; 2026-07-11
observation: Taka-approved FULL_SWAP_CYCLE experiment (Qwen nofp8-sleep -> sleep -> Coder up+verify -> Coder down -> Qwen wake), baseline recorded, rollback-guaranteed. MEASURED FACTS: (1) setup: Qwen on serve_qwen36_nofp8_sleep.sh loaded in 222.1s; gpu 29956+30283 MiB. (2) QWEN SLEEP (level1): POST 200 in 5.5s, is_sleeping=true, gpu 29956+30283 -> 1704+2031 MiB = freed ~28GB/GPU (reconfirms DE-0170). (3) CODER START while Qwen asleep: container codernext_vllm started into the freed VRAM but FAILED to become healthy -> Exited(1), logs: WorkerProc initialization failed due to an exception in a background process / Engine core initialization failed. Coder never allocated VRAM (stayed 1704+2030). => the full swap cycle did NOT complete at the Coder-load step. (4) ROLLBACK (auto, finally): docker rm -f codernext_vllm + serve_qwen36_vllm.sh -> :8005 restored to original fp8, qwen_health 189s, generation 200 OK, config_restored_fp8=true, gpu 29568+29895. Verified serving after.
replication_status: FAILED at coder-load (WorkerProc init exception) in a two-concurrent-vLLM --ipc=host setup; ROLLED_BACK+VERIFIED. total_swap_cycle_time = N/A (cycle incomplete). Qwen sleep/wake mechanism itself = works (DE-0170); the blocker here is bringing Coder up alongside the sleeping Qwen container.
decision: RECORD facts only. Do NOT claim co-serve impossible / bottleneck solved / operating-mode policy (BROAD_CLAIM = REQUIRES_APPROVAL, not asserted). The Coder WorkerProc init exception root cause is NOT isolated (candidates, untested: concurrent --ipc=host shared-memory conflict between two vLLM instances; Coder-specific NVFP4/sm120 load issue; VRAM fragmentation). Next diagnosis experiments (Taka authority): retry Coder with isolated IPC/shm; or capture full Coder engine stack trace; or test Coder-alone cold-load to separate concurrency from Coder-load failure.
decision_owner: Taka (approved experiment) + Claude Code (executed under authority + AUTO_ROLLBACK per policy DE-0169).
note: Qwen sleep frees ~28GB + wake fast (DE-0170) stands; full Qwen<->Coder swap via sleep is BLOCKED by Coder failing to co-load alongside sleeping Qwen here — a measured obstacle, NOT proven impossibility. :8005 restored+serving. self-improvement claim なし. C!=H.

experiment_ref: DS UTT-0045; EGL RUN-00042 OBS-00096..00101; WebSearch+WebFetch (Claude as acquisition runner)
observation: Routed the Coder init-failure through 2DER (DS->RRI research-required->EGL web/github acquisition), NOT local guessing. SOURCE-TRACED DIAGNOSIS MATRIX for TASK-2DER-GPU-SWITCH-001 full-swap Coder failure (EngineCore/WorkerProc initialization failed while Qwen3.6 sleeping, concurrent containers, 2xRTX5090 sm120 PCIe, tp=2): (A) STRONG: vLLM V1 MULTI-INSTANCE MEMORY ACCOUNTING BUG — the 2nd instance (Coder) counts the 1st instance (Qwen, even asleep) memory as non_torch -> negative kv_cache_size -> No available memory for cache blocks -> init fail. matches: 2nd-instance-on-shared-GPU. caveat: nvidia-smi showed Qwen slept to ~2GB, but vLLM V1 accounts ALL memory not just its own (forum 608), so still miscounts. src OBS-00096 (issue #10643, regression v0.6.3->0.6.4+), OBS-00097 (forum 608: V1 does NOT allow reliable multi-instance sharing, no official config fix, recommends sequential/one-per-GPU). (B) STRONG: INTENDED-PATTERN MISMATCH — vLLM zero-reload switching requires BOTH servers started WITH --enable-sleep-mode (separate servers, orchestrated sleep/wake); I started Coder FRESH via serve_codernext_vllm.sh which has NO --enable-sleep-mode, cold, AFTER Qwen slept. src OBS-00098 (official vLLM sleep-mode blog). (C) PARTIAL: Blackwell PCIe custom all-reduce worker-init hang -> --disable-custom-all-reduce + NCCL_P2P_DISABLE=1; caveat: single Qwen loads fine WITHOUT the flag + that symptom is a HANG not Exited(1). src OBS-00099 (discuss 2540, same GPU gen). (D) WEAK: sleeping-vs-woken memory conflict, issue closed not-planned/doc-gap. src OBS-00100 (#14644). related OBS-00101 (#15254 RLHF selective wake_up tags).
replication_status: DIAGNOSIS_SOURCE_TRACED (6 web/github sources ingested to EGL). Root-cause hypothesis (strong): my swap design started a non-sleep Coder fresh alongside a sleeping Qwen -> multi-instance V1 accounting + not the blog pattern.
decision: RECOMMENDED NEXT BOUNDED EXPERIMENT (source-backed, NOT from Claude memory; requires Taka approval, :8005+:8006 interrupt): follow the vLLM blog pattern = make Coder ALSO --enable-sleep-mode (new serve_codernext_nofp8_sleep.sh) and orchestrate per blog. Candidate mitigations for the accounting bug (each source-backed): (i) start BOTH with sleep-mode before sleeping Qwen; (ii) lower Coder --gpu-memory-utilization; (iii) Qwen sleep LEVEL 2 (discard, no residual); (iv) add --disable-custom-all-reduce + NCCL_P2P_DISABLE=1 (Blackwell co-factor). Fallback if multi-instance stays unreliable (forum 608): sequential stop/start (current cold-swap; no sleep benefit). Do NOT claim bottleneck solved / co-serve impossible / policy.
decision_owner: Taka (authority for any :8005 experiment) + Claude Code (acquisition runner + DW manager).

observation: ITEM-2DER-EVO-0020 (Phase-03): operator machine-actor exception guard. Surfaced by DE-0226 (first live 0008 run crashed on an actor exception). Fix is NOT a blanket try/except: an actor exception becomes a STRUCTURED failure -> legal state re-derivation (actual post-state) -> conformance HALT verdict -> classification (_classify_actor_exception: TRANSIENT/CONTRACT/UNKNOWN) -> explicit disposition: TRANSIENT+state-unchanged = bounded RETRY (MAX_ACTOR_RETRIES, idempotent), CONTRACT = HALT, UNKNOWN or partial-state = BLOCKED. A partial result is NEVER treated as success (state_moved => BLOCKED, no retry). Every HALT/BLOCKED records an INTERVENTION (ITEM-0017, detected_by=operator, SENIOR_REVIEW). Also wires conformance-HALT -> INTERVENTION (closes the live-INTERVENTION-firing gap hermetically). Happy path unchanged. test_actor_exception_guard 11/11; operator/dispatch regression parity green. No :8005/GPU.
decision: Ship the structured exception guard (no swallow, no partial-as-success); recommend 0020 DONE. Guard is hermetic-proven; the live-INTERVENTION-firing path is now wired + hermetically exercised.
replication_status: REPRODUCIBLE (hermetic, no :8005/GPU); live-exercise not forced (robustness guard)

No LLM call, no numeric-vs-bool confusion, missing fields never crash. Hermetic, no :8005/GPU/network.

Record schema per §2.2 (failure_classification_id, candidate_classes[class/confidence/supporting_evidence_ids/contradicting_evidence_ids/required_missing_evidence], selected_class, selection_rule, unresolved_alternatives, classification_context_id, created_at, explanation=auxiliary-only). validate_classification enforces: a non-UNKNOWN class with neither supporting_evidence_ids nor required_missing_evidence is INVALID (no free-text classification); selected_class must be an evaluated candidate; selection_rule required; confidence in [0,1]; class in the 6-class set (§13+§3.1); classifier context != executor context. Wires the mandatory FRONT STAGE: FAILURE-RESOURCE-PRECHECK (§3.2) — when a resource signal fired, build_classification auto-injects FAILURE-RESOURCE as a candidate and the validator blocks selecting FAILURE-EXECUTION/FAILURE-DESIGN via route_guard. test 12/12; precheck test parity green. Deterministic, hermetic, no LLM/:8005.
decision: Ship the discrete classification schema + validator as the second Tier-0 gate. It makes an evidence-free or resource-misrouted classification structurally invalid. Recommend child DONE; the retry guard (§2.3) is the next Tier-0 item and will wrap this schema with same-class recurrence detection.

observation: ITEM-2DER-IMPL-PLATFORM-FAILURE-CLASSIFIER-RETRY-GUARD (Phase-10 Tier-0, third audit-envelope gate): twoder.failure_classifier_retry_guard. Stops the classify->send-back->re-implement->same-failure loop (addendum §2.3). Per-task counters over PRIOR attempts: same_class_retry_count, same_artifact_retry_count, same_failure_signature_count (class-independent signature), same_revision_pattern_repeated. Trigger = same_class_retry_count>=2 OR same_failure_signature_count>=2 OR same_revision_pattern_repeated; on trigger it forces the escalation path FAILURE_CLASSIFICATION_CHALLENGED->FAILURE_UNKNOWN->RECLASSIFICATION_REQUIRED with forced_class=FAILURE-UNKNOWN so the stuck class cannot be re-asserted a third time. Deterministic/pure (caller-owned append-only history), hermetic, no LLM/:8005. test 9/9: third same-class attempt triggers; repeated signature triggers regardless of class; repeated revision triggers on first repeat; distinct classes/sigs/revs never trigger (progress allowed); counters scoped per task_id; the forced FAILURE-UNKNOWN reclassification validates under the classifier schema. precheck + schema parity green.
decision: Ship the retry guard as the third Tier-0 gate. Same-classification loops now convert to a mandatory reclassification instead of unbounded re-implementation. Recommend child DONE. Next Tier-0: BENCHMARK-CLAIM-SCOPE + BENCHMARK-RUN-LEDGER (benchmark provenance floor).

observation: ITEM-2DER-IMPL-PLATFORM-STALE-PACKET-GATE (Phase-10 Tier-0, seventh audit-envelope gate): twoder.stale_packet_gate. Consumes the KNOWLEDGE-PACKET-PROVENANCE binding and blocks an artifact from advancing on knowledge that moved under it (addendum §4.4). Flags packet_version_mismatch, packet_hash_mismatch, packet_superseded (a newer packet declares supersedes_packet_id OR explicit superseded_ids), packet_expired (now>valid_until), required_evidence_missing (the bound packet no longer validates via knowledge_packet_provenance), packet_unresolvable (id does not resolve OR malformed binding). Any hit -> state STALE_KNOWLEDGE_PACKET, next_action REBIND_REQUIRED, allow_progress=False; per_packet pinpoints which packet is stale. test 11/11 on real provenance packets/bindings: fresh progresses; each stale condition trips; a validity window is respected; one stale packet in a multi-packet binding blocks the whole thing and is pinpointed; empty binding is stale. Deterministic, hermetic, no LLM/:8005.
decision: Ship the stale packet gate as the seventh Tier-0 gate. A packet update no longer silently leaves old designs 'justified' — the artifact must rebind. Recommend child DONE. Tier-0 knowledge-provenance pair complete. Next Tier-0: ECONOMY-DECISION-LEDGER (§3.3 append-only, CLASS-H).

observation: ITEM-2DER-IMPL-PLATFORM-WEIGHT-INDEPENDENCE-POLICY (Phase-10 Tier-0, ninth audit-envelope gate): twoder.weight_independence_policy. Records the true independence of an audit relationship (§5.1-5.2): CONTEXT_INDEPENDENT (context ids differ), WEIGHT_INDEPENDENT (weight ids differ — COMPUTED from weight ids, never caller-asserted), CORRELATED_BLIND_SPOT_RISK (NONE weight-diverse / ACCEPTED context-diverse same-weight / UNMITIGATED same-context). validate_record enforces AC-WEIGHT-01: a same-weight pair can NEVER be recorded as WEIGHT_INDEPENDENT=true, and recorded fields must match the computed truth. Supplies the primitives CLASS-NH-TRIAD-AUDIT consumes: panel() summarizes a Creator/Adversarial/Adjudicator triad (WEIGHT_DIVERSE / PARTIAL / SAME_WEIGHT + context separation + residual flag); policy_decision() makes CLASS-N/H require context separation, prefer weight diversity, and treat same-weight as acceptable ONLY with residual recorded + stricter human approval (§5.4), while CLASS-S/M do not require weight independence. test 11/11 incl. the AC-WEIGHT-01 forgery rejection. Reuses the independent_judge context-inequality discipline. Deterministic, hermetic, no LLM/:8005.
decision: Ship the weight-independence policy as the ninth Tier-0 gate. Same-weight L2 review can no longer be misrecorded as full independence, and the residual is explicit. Recommend child DONE. observation: ITEM-2DER-IMPL-PLATFORM-CLASS-NH-TRIAD-AUDIT (Phase-10 Tier-0, tenth audit-envelope gate): twoder.class_nh_triad_audit. For CLASS-N/CLASS-H the L2 audit is a TRIAD inside L2 (addendum §5.3, AC-WEIGHT-02) — Creator / Adversarial Reviewer / Independent Adjudicator — NOT a third audit level (§6.3). run_triad enforces: the three roles are in three separate contexts (via weight_independence_policy.panel); adversarial findings use the allowed categories (hidden_assumptions/counterexamples/scope_expansion/unverified_connections/stale_knowledge/missing_evidence/test_blind_spots/interface_conflicts) with OPEN/RESOLVED/REFUTED status; the adjudicator verdict is from the fixed set APPROVED/REVISION_REQUIRED/ADDITIONAL_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED/HUMAN_DECISION_REQUIRED; APPROVED is IMPOSSIBLE over an OPEN adversarial finding (downgraded to REVISION_REQUIRED); a same/partial-weight triad flags the correlated-blind-spot residual and requires stricter human approval (§5.4); a non-policy-acceptable config escalates to HUMAN_DECISION_REQUIRED; CLASS-M/S/T do not require the triad. Consumes weight_independence_policy and reuses the independent_judge separation discipline. test 11/11. Deterministic, hermetic, no LLM/:8005. Running the three roles as live workers is a later gated step; this fixes the structure + consistency rules.

observation: ITEM-2DER-IMPL-PLATFORM-CHANGE-CLASSIFIER (Phase-10 Tier-1, first core schema/policy item): twoder.change_classifier. Deterministic, signal-based mapping of a change descriptor to CLASS-N/H/M/S/T (spec §7) and derivation of the required audits — the entry point that drives TWO-LEVEL-AUDIT-POLICY and the CLASS-N/H triad. Novelty signals (esde/novel_architecture/new_algorithm/evaluation_unestablished/no_reference_impl) -> CLASS-N; high-impact signals (production/model_routing/evidence_judgment/state_machine/gpu_control/db_migration/security/multi_repo) -> CLASS-H; cosmetic+behavior_unchanged -> CLASS-T; single_module+rollback_easy+iface_unchanged+existing_pattern -> CLASS-S; else CLASS-M. Precedence N>H>T>S>M: novelty dominates, and a cosmetic edit in a high-impact domain stays CLASS-H (conservative). required_audits: N/H = full design/impl/test L1+L2 + triad; M = impl_L1+test_L1 with design_L2 ONLY on interface_change/multiple_modules/design_uncertainty; S = impl_L1+test_L1 (L2 on anomaly); T = mechanical_diff_only. An unknown descriptor defaults to CLASS-M (never silently trivial). test 12/12. Deterministic, hermetic, no LLM/:8005.
decision: Ship the change classifier as the first Tier-1 item. Audit depth is now derived deterministically from the change's properties and feeds the triad + two-level policy. Recommend child DONE. Natural next Tier-1: TWO-LEVEL-AUDIT-POLICY (consumes this class + CLASS-NH-TRIAD-AUDIT) or the domain/interface schemas.

Wires CHANGE-CLASSIFIER's class to the ordered audit stages (spec §6-7). build_audit_plan emits per-stage {stage,level,owner,independent,triad}: L1 = creator self-check (NOT independent, §6.1); L2 = separate context (independent, §6.2) and for CLASS-N/H L2 is internally the triad (class_nh_triad_audit). CLASS-M adds design_L2 only on interface_change/multiple_modules/design_uncertainty; CLASS-S = impl_L1+test_L1 self (L2 on anomaly); CLASS-T = one mechanical diff stage. validate_l2_separation enforces creator!=L2-auditor context. ENFORCES §6.3: NO standard third-level audit — assert_no_third_level rejects any third_audit/L3/level_3 and any route outside the 5-route set {additional_research, additional_evidence, design_rollback, limited_additional_test, human_decision}; next_on_l2 maps L2/triad verdicts (APPROVED proceeds; REVISION->design_rollback; ADDITIONAL_EVIDENCE->additional_evidence; HUMAN->human_decision; unknown->additional_research) — never a third audit. test 12/12; change-classifier + triad parity green. observation: ITEM-2DER-IMPL-PLATFORM-ESCALATION-ROUTER (Phase-10 Tier-1): twoder.escalation_router. The routing brain that ties the Tier-0 failure machinery together and enforces the spec's core correction: a bad Qwen result is NOT forwarded wholesale to Claude and NOT sent wholesale to the human. route() runs the resource precheck front stage, applies the classifier-schema gate, then routes by class (§13): FAILURE-EXECUTION->IMPLEMENTATION (to_claude L2 impl audit), FAILURE-DESIGN->DESIGN (to_claude False — Claude does design L2 audit ONLY, no re-implement, §13.2), FAILURE-KNOWLEDGE->RESEARCH, FAILURE-TEST->TEST (do not fail the impl for a bad test), FAILURE-RESOURCE->RESOURCE remediation, FAILURE-UNKNOWN->IDENTIFY (no cause fixation). The resource signal FORCES FAILURE-RESOURCE over an impl/design label (§3.2); a triggered retry-guard forces RECLASSIFICATION_REQUIRED instead of routing to a process (§2.3); the human is reached ONLY on the nine §15 conditions (producing a human-escalation draft for the ledger); a Claude hand-off must carry the §14 packet (failure_class/approved_specification/affected_domain/raw_evidence/known_constraints/prohibited_changes/expected_output/acceptance_criteria) — never 'investigate and fix everything'. test 12/12; failure trio + human-ledger parity green. Deterministic, hermetic, no LLM/:8005.
decision: Ship the escalation router as a Tier-1 item. Failures now route to the correct process by classified cause, escalation is model-agnostic (not a Claude upgrade) and human-minimal (§15 only), and Claude only ever receives a packet. Recommend child DONE. Natural next: HUMAN-ESCALATION-PACKET (the single-decision packet the router's human draft needs) or the domain/interface schemas.

observation: ITEM-2DER-IMPL-PLATFORM-HUMAN-ESCALATION-PACKET (Phase-10 Tier-1): twoder.human_escalation_packet. What actually reaches the human (spec §15): a SINGLE decision, not a work-history dump. build_packet/validate_packet enforce decision_point (single string) + >=2 differentiated options (each with a 'difference') + a recommendation among them + uncertainty + default_if_undecided, and STRUCTURALLY forbid bulk-history fields (work_history/full_transcript/entire_history/... — the 'please look at everything' anti-pattern). from_router_draft bridges ESCALATION-ROUTER's human_escalation_draft (carrying trigger_state/reason/failure_class provenance); to_ledger_row emits a row HUMAN-ESCALATION-LEDGER.open_escalation accepts (options_presented = option labels, recommended among them). test 11/11 incl. the router->packet->ledger integration. This closes the router->ledger bridge: a §15 escalation now produces a well-formed single-decision packet that is recorded. Deterministic, hermetic, no LLM/:8005.
decision: Ship the human escalation packet as a Tier-1 item; the escalation path (router -> §15 packet -> ledger) is now end-to-end and the human only ever sees one decision with options + recommendation + default. observation: ITEM-2DER-IMPL-PLATFORM-DOMAIN-SPECIALIZATION-SCHEMA (Phase-10 Tier-1): twoder.domain_specialization_schema. The DOMAIN axis of the two-axis split (spec §2.2-§4). DOMAINS = the 16 distinct development units (UI/APPLICATION_LOGIC/API/DATABASE/FILESYSTEM/ENVIRONMENT/CONTAINER/NETWORK/AUTHENTICATION_AUTHORIZATION/SECURITY/LLM_SERVING/MODEL_ROUTING/OBSERVABILITY/DEPLOYMENT/OPERATIONS/MIGRATION). decision_permitted encodes the boundary rule: a specialist decides ONLY within its own domain — 'a UI specialist may not decide NETWORK', 'app-logic may not decide directory/container/auth/model-routing' (§2.2); cross-domain decisions route via INTERFACE-CONTRACT / the owning domain. assign_domain sets default prohibited_domains = all other domains; validate_domain_assignment rejects a cross-domain decision, an unknown domain, self-in-prohibited, or missing-others. DOMAIN_RECORD_SECTIONS = the §4 per-domain stored artifacts (requirement/research/constraints/design/decisions/interfaces/open_questions/implementation/test_conditions/test_results/known_failures); validate_domain_record requires them so the next AI need not infer design from implementation. to_knowledge_packet_fields bridges to KNOWLEDGE-PACKET-PROVENANCE (a domain packet is a provenance-complete knowledge packet). test 12/12. Deterministic, hermetic, no LLM/:8005.
decision: Ship the domain specialization schema as a Tier-1 item. The domain axis + decision-boundary rule are now enforced (no domain grabs another's structural decisions), and per-domain knowledge is required to be stored. Recommend child DONE. Pairs with the future INTERFACE-CONTRACT-SCHEMA (the inter-domain boundary owner).

observation: ITEM-2DER-IMPL-PLATFORM-INTERFACE-CONTRACT-SCHEMA (Phase-10 Tier-1): twoder.interface_contract_schema. The Interface Contract owner defines ONLY the agreed boundary values between two domains (spec §5) and MUST NOT reach into any domain's internal architecture (addendum §6). ALLOWED_CONTRACT_FIELDS = the §5/§6 boundary set (endpoint/input+output+error schema/timeout/retry/cancellation/auth requirement/filesystem_path/port/process_lifecycle/resource_requirement/ownership/version_compatibility). FORBIDDEN_INTERNAL_FIELDS = the §6 internal-design set (internal_architecture/ui_internal_structure/database_internal_implementation/network_topology/container_internal_config/model_selection/resource_allocation_policy/security_internal_design), each mapped to the owning domain via defer_to_domain. validate_contract requires two distinct valid domains (+ 'ALL' broadcast for OBSERVABILITY->ALL), a channel, the minimal required fields, rejects any non-boundary or internal field, and requires ownership to name a real domain. resolves_cross_domain makes an interface contract the SOLE legitimate channel for a cross-domain decision that DOMAIN-SPECIALIZATION-SCHEMA forbids a specialist from making alone. test 13/13; domain-schema parity green. Deterministic, hermetic, no LLM/:8005.
decision: Ship the interface contract schema as a Tier-1 item; it pairs with DOMAIN-SPECIALIZATION-SCHEMA — domains decide internally, the interface owner owns only the boundary, and internal overreach is structurally rejected. observation: ITEM-2DER-IMPL-PLATFORM-DISSENT-WORKER (Phase-10 Tier-1): twoder.dissent_worker. An approximation of the user's intuitive audit (spec §16): a worker asked, WITHOUT knowing the main conclusion, to assume the design/result is WRONG and name the 3 most suspect places (§16.1). build_dissent_packet strips the conclusion/leading fields (conclusion/expected_verdict/verdict/interpretation/recommendation/prior_conclusion/main_result/hunch/leading_note) so the worker is conclusion-BLIND; validate_dissent_packet rejects any leak. validate_dissent_findings requires >=3 grounded suspects (location + why_suspect) and forbids the dissent output from carrying a verdict (suspicion, not adjudication). surprise_flags computes the §16.5 Surprise Flags from MEASURABLE features (output_overly_consistent / failure_cause_snapped_to_one / no_control_experiment / too_aligned_with_prior_conclusion / explanation_longer_than_evidence / interpretation_before_raw_log). to_l2_auxiliary packages the output as AUXILIARY EVIDENCE for the SECOND audit — explicitly not_a_third_audit and not a verdict (§16 end). test 11/11, incl. an ITEM-0015-style premature single-cause snap being surprise-flagged. Deterministic, hermetic, no LLM/:8005.
decision: Ship the dissent worker as a Tier-1 item; the intuitive-audit substitute now produces conclusion-blind suspicions + measurable surprise flags that feed L2 without inflating to a third audit. Recommend child DONE. Next Tier-1: ASSUMPTION-EXTRACTOR (§16.2) or the EGL-integration items.

observation: ITEM-2DER-TEMPORAL-PROVENANCE-DECOMPOSITION (§11 deliverable): DECOMPOSITION_v1 (ART ART-90aa3ff6c4). GROUNDED timestamp inventory (actual field inspection): DE ledger 272 rows carry NO timestamp field at all; CHANGE_LOG recorded_at 117/161 filled; ROADMAP registered_at 196/196 but NAIVE; ARTIFACT_REGISTRY fully timestamped; JREV date 7/7; git commit time is the ONLY machine-generated tz-aware clock (+09:00). LOAD-BEARING finding: the ts values passed into set_status/register/admit/record_change are SELF-ASSIGNED by Claude (typed), not read from a wall clock — the §3.1/§3.2 hazard — so any velocity from them measures typed numbers, not elapsed time; git commit ts + file_mtime are the only trustworthy retrospective sources. Field diff vs §4: no timezone anywhere, DE has no recorded_at, no started/completed/wall_clock, no active_work/tool_wait/human_wait split. Retrofit split: git-inferred timing (INFERRED class) for past CHG/DE/ITEM via after_commit hash; go-forward-only for the wait split and true started_at. Completion Definition v1 candidate CDEF-2DER-v1 (version+hash+required_flag_ids each bound to an acceptance artifact + JREV; removal/relaxation needs CHG+DE+JREV). Velocity formula sourced from git (not typed ts) with reference records + forecast output contract (remaining work + expected sessions, not a date; per-session throughput is the meaningful unit; this session=1 sample). UNKNOWN-VARIANCE rule (CLASS-N / no precedent / n<3 / self-typed-only). 10 recommended child units (§12) mapped build-vs-reuse with a suggested order, then ECONOMY-OPERATOR unblocks. NOT done: child ITEM id issuance, code, retrofit, DB change, Completion-Definition approval, independent different-weight review. This deliverable is single-context self-audited.
decision: Deliver the temporal decomposition. Recommend the audit-envelope-first-style order (event schema -> time-binding validator -> wait ledger -> velocity/estimation/unknown-variance -> completion registry+flag gate -> forecast report -> temporal-egl-integration), then ECONOMY-OPERATOR. Adopt git commit time as the canonical clock and stop grounding velocity on self-typed ts. Child-id issuance + Completion-Definition v1 flag set await Taka.

observation: ITEM-2DER-TEMPORAL-TEMPORAL-EVENT-SCHEMA (Phase-10 temporal child #1): twoder.temporal_event_schema. The foundation record for time in 2DER (spec §4 + DECOMPOSITION_v1). Every temporal event carries a timezone-aware recorded_at + timezone + source_record_id + clock_source + timing_class. Enforces the decomposition's load-bearing rule: a SELF-TYPED timestamp (what Claude passes into the ledgers today) can NEVER be recorded above REPORTED (§3.2); git commit time is MEASURED only when NATIVE (the event is that commit), else INFERRED (a proxy for another record's authoring time); file_mtime native = MEASURED; machine_clock = MEASURED. max_timing_class gives the ceiling; validate_event rejects a tz-naive recorded_at (AC-TIME-01), a missing timezone/source_record_id, an unknown event_type/clock_source, and any timing_class above the clock ceiling. is_measured is true only for a real measurement. test 11/11, incl. the current reality: a self-typed set_status ts recorded as an item_done event is REPORTED, not MEASURED. Deterministic, hermetic, no LLM/:8005. First of the 10 approved temporal child units; git is the canonical clock.
decision: Ship the temporal event schema as temporal child #1. The self-typed-ts hazard is now structurally capped at REPORTED and git is the canonical MEASURED clock. Recommend child DONE. Next: TIME-BINDING-VALIDATOR (AC-TIME-01/02 enforcement across records).

AC-TIME-01: validate_time_binding requires an important record to carry a validating temporal_event OR a tz-aware recorded_at + timezone. AC-TIME-02: compute_wall_clock recomputes wall_clock_seconds timezone-correctly from two temporal events (parses given ISO strings via datetime.fromisoformat — no current-time call), rejects tz-naive endpoints and completed<started, and the span inherits the WEAKER timing class of its endpoints (any self-typed endpoint -> REPORTED span). AC-TIME-03: validate_wait_split requires active_work/tool_wait/human_wait all present + non-negative + summing to <= wall_clock, reporting the unaccounted remainder. test 12/12 incl. a cross-timezone span (20:00+09:00 -> 12:00+00:00 = 3600s). decision: Ship the time-binding validator as temporal child #2. AC-TIME-01/02/03 are now enforceable: records must be tz-bound, spans recompute correctly and cannot claim MEASURED off a self-typed endpoint, and the wait split is required. Recommend child DONE. Next: ACTIVE-WORK-AND-WAIT-LEDGER (go-forward capture of the split).

Formalizes AC-EST-01 — NO naked number. validate_estimate requires every figure to carry a value, a unit, a non-empty formula, and >=1 RESOLVABLE reference record id (a known 2DER id prefix ITEM/DE/CHG/ART/BENCH/AWW/TEV/TRACE/... or a git commit hash), plus a valid timing_class. resolvable_ref checks the prefix/git-hash shape; assert_no_naked_number is a guard any downstream can call before emitting a figure. bind_group_statistic wraps a HISTORICAL-VELOCITY-CALCULATOR group statistic (p50/p80/median/...) into a validated estimate carrying the group's formula + reference record ids + timing class — a self-typed-degraded group binds but honestly carries REPORTED (not MEASURED). test 11/11 incl. the velocity->estimate integration. observation: ITEM-2DER-TEMPORAL-UNKNOWN-VARIANCE-POLICY (Phase-10 temporal child #6): twoder.unknown_variance_policy. Enforces §6/AC-EST-02 — when there is no honest empirical basis, 2DER says UNKNOWN-VARIANCE and emits NO number rather than fabricate one. classify_item_variance flags an item UNKNOWN-VARIANCE when ANY of: class_n_novel (change_class==CLASS-N), no_precedent (no matching velocity group), insufficient_samples (group sample_count<3), self_typed_only (group timing_class==REPORTED). A git-proxy INFERRED group is usable but confidence=inferred; a MEASURED group with >=3 samples is confidence=measured. emit_estimate_or_unknown is the single choke point: it returns a basis-bound ESTIMATE (via ESTIMATION-BASIS-BINDING) when honest, else an UNKNOWN-VARIANCE record with value=None. session_variance turns a <3-session throughput into an UNKNOWN-VARIANCE observed RANGE with point_estimate_forbidden=True (a point estimate off n=1 is forbidden). test 11/11 incl. reasons stacking. Deterministic, hermetic, no LLM/:8005. Temporal child #6.
decision: Ship the UNKNOWN-VARIANCE policy as temporal child #6. A forecast can no longer put a number on a CLASS-N / no-precedent / thin-sample / self-typed item — it must say UNKNOWN-VARIANCE.
